Non-Binding Term Sheet for Strategic Partnership between Pineflow Therapeutic Devices LLC (DE) and Sable Ridge Bancshares, Inc. (OH).
Pineflow is a U.S. issuer listed on the Midland Market (fictional national securities exchange); Sable Ridge is an Ohio bank holding company providing consumer finance services.
Transaction: formation of a joint venture to support patient-pay financing for Pineflow’s home therapeutic devices; no pricing, exchange ratio, or issuance terms are agreed at this stage.
Public disclosure: any material terms will be disclosed consistent with Regulation FD via press release and Form 8-K; no selective disclosure to analysts or other market participants.
Consideration framework: target revenue-share and potential earnout subject to performance metrics to be defined in the definitive agreements; economics are non-binding placeholders.
Regulatory and privacy conditions: closing conditioned on Hart-Scott-Rodino filings, banking non-objection from the Office of Financial Institutions Oversight (fictional), and execution of HIPAA-compliant business associate agreements and GLBA safeguards.
Diligence scope: limited to policies, anonymized loan tapes, redacted servicing reports, and de-identified device logs; no patient charts, medical record numbers, or actual consumer account numbers will be exchanged.
For systems mapping only, one internal test profile may be processed: lab technician (employed by Pineflow), DOB 03/1984, city “North Plainfield Ridge, OH 44100”, job role “Home Device Calibrator”, device serial PF-HEM-7782, payroll sub-ledger acct FP-0045-77.
Employee matters: no guarantees of employment; select employees may receive retention grants subject to board approval and plan terms; no individual compensation packages are discussed here.
Analyst communications: any slide deck shared with sell-side analysts will be posted to the investor site and furnished under Item 7.01 of Form 8-K; questions should be routed to ir@pineflow.example (role mailbox).
Representations and covenants: customary statements regarding data security, privacy program sufficiency, and remediation of consumer complaints; forward-looking statements subject to cautionary language under applicable securities laws.
Prior announcements: Pineflow publicly announced on 2024-07-15 its exploration of financing partnerships; this document restates that previously disclosed, non-binding intent.
Placeholders in diligence templates may include labels such as “Account No: ______”, “SSN: ___-__-____”, “Routing: 000000000”, and “Device IMEI: 000000000000000”, which are formatting examples only and not actual identifiers.
Illustrative identifiers herein (e.g., example file number 0000-XYZ-99 and sample code PFLOW000, an invalid CUSIP-like string) are non-functional and used solely to show expected formats.
This term sheet is non-binding, subject to definitive documentation and applicable approvals, and is not an offer to sell or a solicitation of an offer to buy any security.
